data.title_en: What to say when slaughtering or sacrificing an animal

items.chapter_title_en: What to say when slaughtering or sacrificing an animal
items.arabic_text: ((بِسْمِ اللَّهِ وَاللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ [اللَّهُمَّ مِنْكَ وَلَكَ] اللَّهُمَّ تَقَبَّلْ مِنِّي)).
items.english_text: (In the name of Allah, and Allah is the greatest.  O Allah, (it is) from You and belongs to You, O Allah, accept this from me.)

LANGUAGE_ARABIC_TRANSLATED_TEXT.raw: (Bismil-lah wallahu akbar, allahumma minka walak, allahumma taqabbal  minnee.)
